name: Crushing Blow
description: A powerful melee strike. Good signature ability for Brute creatures.

name: Mind Lash
description: A ranged psionic attack. Good signature ability for Controller or Hexer creatures.

name: Shield Wall
description: A defensive maneuver. Good for Defender creatures.

properties.effect: The creature gains {@resource damage-resistance} 3 until the start of its next turn. Each ally adjacent to the creature also gains {@resource damage-resistance} 1.

name: Quick Strike
description: A fast melee strike with repositioning. Good signature ability for Harrier creatures.

name: Hex Bolt
description: A debilitating magical bolt. Good signature ability for Hexer creatures.

name: Retaliating Strike
description: A reactive strike when allies are threatened. Good triggered ability for Defender creatures.

properties.trigger: A creature adjacent to this creature attacks one of its allies.

name: Rallying Cry
description: A villain action opener that buffs allies. Good for Leader creatures.

properties.effect: Each target gains 10 {@resource temporary-stamina} and can {@movement shift} 2.

name: Longbow Volley
description: A long-range precision shot. Good signature ability for Artillery creatures.

name: Ambush Strike
description: A devastating first strike from concealment. Good signature ability for Ambusher creatures.

properties.tier3: 9 damage; if the creature was {@condition hidden}, deal an extra 4 damage

name: Trampling Charge
description: A charging attack that knocks enemies aside. Good signature ability for Mount creatures.

properties.tier3: 9 damage; {@movement push} 3 and the target falls {@condition prone}

name: Healing Word
description: A restorative ability that heals allies. Good signature ability for Support creatures.

properties.effect: The target regains stamina equal to their recovery value.

name: Venom Bite
description: A venomous bite that deals ongoing poison damage. Versatile melee signature.

properties.tier3: 8 poison damage; 5 poison damage ({@duration eot}, {@duration save-ends})

name: Breath Weapon
description: A devastating area breath attack. Damage type varies by creature (fire, cold, poison, etc.).

name: Web Shot
description: A sticky web projectile that immobilizes targets. Good for spider-type creatures.

name: Psychic Scream
description: A burst of psychic energy that disrupts nearby enemies. Good for Controller creatures.

name: Rally
description: A supportive maneuver that bolsters nearby allies. Good for Support creatures.

name: Fade to Shadow
description: A stealth maneuver that grants concealment and repositioning. Good for Ambusher creatures.

properties.effect: The creature becomes {@condition hidden} and can {@movement shift} up to their speed. They gain concealment until the end of their next turn.

name: Defensive Stance
description: A tanking maneuver that draws attacks and reduces damage. Good for Defender creatures.

properties.effect: The creature gains {@resource damage-resistance} 5 and {@condition taunted|taunts} all enemies within 2 until the start of its next turn. While in this stance, the creature cannot shift.

name: Intercept
description: A reactive strike that prevents enemies from escaping. Good triggered ability for Defender creatures.

properties.trigger: An enemy within reach moves away from the creature.
properties.tier2: 4 damage; the target's speed becomes 0 ({@duration eot})
properties.tier3: 6 damage; the target's speed becomes 0 ({@duration eot}) and is {@condition taunted} ({@duration eot})

name: Death Burst
description: An explosion of energy on death. Good for volatile creatures like fire elementals or unstable undead.

properties.trigger: The creature is reduced to 0 stamina.
properties.effect: Each target takes 5 damage of the creature's primary damage type.

name: Terrifying Roar
description: A villain action closer that terrifies enemies. Good for Solo or Leader creatures.

properties.tier2: {@condition frightened} ({@duration save-ends}); the target must use their next move action to move away
properties.tier3: {@condition frightened} ({@duration save-ends}); the target is also {@condition dazed} ({@duration eot})

name: Summon Minions
description: A villain action escalation that brings reinforcements. Good for Leader creatures.

properties.effect: The creature summons a squad of 4 minions of an appropriate type in unoccupied spaces within range. The minions act on the creature's initiative.

name: Focused Assault
description: A villain action escalation featuring a flurry of devastating melee attacks.
